meaning: adj.支气管原的,产生于支气管的 影响支气管的
examples: Objective To investigate the Clinical and CT manifestations of bronchogenic cysts.
Diagnosis: Lymphangitic spread of carcinoma, right hilar bronchogenic carcinoma, with interlobular septal thickening.
Objective To improve the levels of diagnosis , differential diagnosis and treatment of intrapulmonary bronchogenic cyst.
